name: Magellan Minerals Ltd.
description: Magellan Minerals Ltd. is a Canadian-based junior exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. The company primarily concentrates its operations on gold exploration and development projects located in the Tapajós region of the state of Pará in northern Brazil. Its key assets include the Cuiú Cuiú and Coringa projects, where the company has conducted extensive exploration activities to identify and advance gold resources. As a publicly traded entity on the TSX Venture Exchange, Magellan Minerals operates as a resource-focused firm dedicated to unlocking value through strategic mineral exploration in South America.
